nasb.text: There he found a man named Aeneas, who had been bedridden eight years, for he was paralyzed.

esv.text: There he found a man named Aeneas, bedridden for eight years, who was paralyzed.

cnv.text: 他遇見一個人，名叫以尼雅，害了癱瘓病，在床上躺臥了八年。

ccb.text: 遇见一个已经卧床八年、名叫以尼雅的瘫子。

csbs.text: 在那里，他遇见了一个名叫艾尼亚的人。他是个瘫痪的人，躺在垫子上八年了。
